text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, with the spring Tenno Sho drawing
close, Biwa Hayahide shows up looking especially
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, her sister, has recently won the
Satsuki Sho and set a new track record.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the remarkable feat has dealt a spectacular
blow to Biwa Hayahide, casting a shadow of
doubt over her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin confesses to Biwa Hayahide that
she's always thought of her as a "real pain in the
butt."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her attempt to bring comfort is awkward
at best, it's Narita Taishin's best effort to
encourage her friend and rival.
